results.name: has_hook
results.detail: "A daily handful of nuts, *a longer life*."

results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: The parallel structure is clean but 'a longer life' is a promise the audience has heard a thousand times — needs a sharper or more surprising angle to earn the stop.
rationales.clarity: Each slide holds one idea and the portion-sense slide is genuinely actionable, though slide 6 retreads slide 2 without adding anything new.
rationales.audience_fit: Grab-and-go framing and 'steady energy' speak directly to the busy, tired-by-3pm crowd, though the longevity angle skews slightly older than the core 20–35 demo.
rationales.novelty: 'Eat nuts, live longer' is one of the most-covered nutrition talking points on health TikTok — there's no fresh angle, counterintuitive stat, or reframe to make this version stand out.
rationales.brand_fit: Health claims are properly hedged ('may add up', 'can support'), voice stays plain and non-hypey, and the CTA ties back to the score cleanly — button label is missing though.
rationales.predicted_performance: Saves are plausible given the actionable portion tip, but the generic topic and weak hook ceiling limits shares and reach relative to a more contrarian or surprising deck.
